rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are properly formatted with `annex agree {** ... **};`
Align helper declaration types with expression types for valid comparisons
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over non-numeric data ports
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Ensure helper declarations are properly typed for valid comparisons
Avoid unsafe clauses involving non-numeric data ports
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;` for range comparisons
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are properly formatted with `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
anti_patterns: Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over non-numeric data ports
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not align helper declaration types with expression types for invalid comparisons
